name: Titanic Advance

src.description: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4"or less in height as if they were not there.

note: Omits height-limit (4" or less); scope says unit but applies to this model individually

name: Towering Wraith Construct

src.description: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend twice that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

note: Vague 'spend ? from ?'; rule doubles CP cost on all Stratagems targeting this model

name: Revenant Jet Pack

src.description: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 8"to the Move characteristic of this model.

note: Simplifies Advance mechanic; omits 'do not make Advance roll' and +8" during Advance only

name: Support Weapon

src.description: Each time an attack targets this model’s unit, if that unit contains one or more other models, until that attack is resolved, this model has a Toughness characteristic of 3.

note: Conditional trigger (unit has other models) missing; T=3 applies during attack resolution not permanently

name: Monofilament Snare

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its shadow weaver. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is snared. While a unit is snared, each time that unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 for each model in that unit:for each 1, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

note: Describes 1 MW; omits shadow-weaver weapon requirement, snared status, movement-roll-based damage

name: Support Artillery

src.description:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model can join one GUARDIAN DEFENDERS unit from your army (a unit cannot have more than one SUPPORT WEAPON model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that GUARDIANS unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

This model, and any unit it is joined to, cannot embark within a TRANSPORT.

note: Forced-attachment oversimplifies; omits GUARDIAN DEFENDERS unit requirement and transport embargo

name: Mandiblasters

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if it made a Charge move this turn, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

note: Generated '-5 to hit' is nonsensical; rule gives unmodified 5+ Critical Hit on charged attacks

name: Aspect Shrine Token

src.description: Once per battle for each Aspect Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit (excluding CHARACTER models) to an unmodified 6.

note: Describes persistent -1; omits 'one use per token', one reroll per ability use, and CHARACTER exclusion

name: Leader

src.description: Before the battle, CHARACTER units with the Leader ability can be attached to one of their Bodyguard units to form an Attached unit.

note: Vague 'leader' ability; omits CHARACTER keyword and formation context

name: Psychic Guidance

src.description: While this model is within 12"of one or more friendly AELDARI PSYKER models, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by this model by 1 and it has a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

note: Describes Ld=6; omits BS/WS improvement and PSYKER-unit proximity requirement

name: Fated Hero

src.description: At the start of the battle, select one of the following keywords:INFANTRY; MONSTER; MOUNTED; VEHICLE. Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit with the selected keyword, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‐roll a Wound roll of 1.

note: Condition logic vague ('target has A'); omits battle-start keyword selection and applies to one selected keyword

name: Wave Serpent Shield

src.description: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

note: Omits conditional trigger (Strength > Toughness); applies to wound rolls not broadly to all phases

name: Word of the Phoenix (Psychic)

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, roll one D6:on a 2+, D3+1 destroyed Bodyguard models (excluding SUPPORT WEAPON models) are returned to that unit with their full wounds remaining.

note: Omits 'at start of Command phase' timing; double condition in parentheses unclear; SUPPORT WEAPON exclusion missing

name: Herald of Ynnead

src.description: Herald of Ynnead: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly AELDARI model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re‐roll a Wound roll of 1.

note: Omits target-selection and Engagement Range requirement; describes 1-reroll but applies in Fight phase only

name: Servant of The Whispering God

src.description: If your army includes YVRAINE, it cannot include any EPIC HERO units (excluding YNNARI units). If your army includes any EPIC HERO units (excluding YNNARI units), it cannot include YVRAINE.

note: Vague 'composition constraint'; omits YVRAINE-specific rule and EPIC HERO exclusion logic

name: Piratical Raiders

src.description: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities while targeting that unit.

note: Omits battle-start opponent-unit selection; benefits only apply when targeting selected unit

name: Mistshield

src.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

note: Vague '?+ invulnerable'; should specify 4+ save; missing 'bearer' context

name: Channeller Stones

src.description: Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for the bearer’s unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

note: Vague 'reduce by ?'; omits 'once per turn', 'first failed save', and 'change Damage to 0' mechanic

name: Crystal Matrix

src.description: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re‐roll one Hit roll and you can re‐roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

note: Omits 'when selected to shoot' timing; allows reroll of Hit and Wound separately, not both always

name: Aspect Training

src.description:
■ While this model is leading a HOWLING BANSHEES unit, it has the Fights First ability.
■ While this model is leading a STRIKING SCORPIONS unit, it has the Infiltrators, Scouts 7"and Stealth abilities.

note: Describes one ability; rule has branching: HOWLING BANSHEES vs STRIKING SCORPIONS with different abilities

name: Tormentors

src.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Omits 'start of Fight phase' timing and Engagement Range requirement; vague 'enemy within aura'

name: Assured Destruction

src.description: In your Shooting phase, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re‐roll the Hit roll, you can re‐roll the Wound roll and you can re‐roll the Damage roll.

note: Applies to MONSTER/VEHICLE targets only; generated text suggests blanket reroll application

name: Tactical Acumen

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase, after that unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

note: Omits '6" Normal move' distance; describes generic shoot-and-scoot, missing charge-ineligibility consequence

name: Hand of Asuryan

src.description: Once per battle, when this model is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, its Bloody Twins weapon has a Damage characteristic of 3 and the [ANTI‐INFANTRY 5+] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

note: Describes generic DEVASTATING WOUNDS; rule is weapon-specific (Bloody Twins) with Damage bump and ANTI-INFANTRY

name: Stormblades

src.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

note: Vague '? OC'; identical to objective-scouted rule; omits objective-marker proximity and Level-of-Control mechanics

name: Crewed Platform

src.description: When the last Storm Guardian model in this unit is destroyed, any remaining Serpent’s Scale Platform models in this unit are also destroyed.

note: Condition vague; omits 'last Storm Guardian' trigger and 'Serpent's Scale Platform' model destruction sequence

name: Serpent shield

src.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

note: Generates '?+ save' instead of '5+ invulnerable'; scope is unit (correct) but missing unit-context

name: Structural Collapse

src.description: Each time this model makes an attack with its D‐cannon, re‐roll a Damage roll of 1. If that attack targets a TITANIC unit, you can re‐roll the Damage roll instead.

note: Omits weapon-specific (D-cannon) and base 1-reroll; rule allows conditional full reroll vs 1-reroll

name: Psychic Communion (Psychic)

src.description: Each time this unit is selected to shoot, for each WARLOCK model in this unit, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of that model’s Destructor weapon for each other friendly AELDARI PSYKER model within 6"of that model (to a maximum of +2).

note: Completely misses the actual mechanic: +1 to Attacks only per PSYKER within 6", max +2, per WARLOCK model, weaponry-specific (Destructor).

name: Empyric Ambush

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it used its Flickerjump ability.

note: Missing condition: unit only gains charge eligibility this turn if Flickerjump was used, not as a permanent benefit.

name: Whispering Web

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly AELDARI model makes an attack that targets that unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

note: Wrong mechanic: improves hit rolls to 5+ for friendly units, not a general post-attack debuff.

name: Death is Not Enough

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle‐shock test. If one or more of those attacks destroyed a model in that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

note: Vague 'debuff'; actually forces morale test with potential -1 if model destroyed, excludes MONSTERS/VEHICLES.

name: Cruel Amusement

src.description:
In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, select one of the abilities below. Until the end of the phase, this model’s shrieker cannon has that ability.
■ [IGNORES COVER]
■ [PRECISION]
■ [SUSTAINED HITS 3]

note: Says model gains all three abilities; actually picks one per phase, weapon-specific (shrieker cannon).

name: Prince of Corsairs

src.description: After both players have deployed their armies, if this unit is on the battlefield (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within is on the battlefield), select up to three AELDARI units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

note: Confusing scope; mechanic is conditional redeploy of up to 3 AELDARI units with Strategic Reserves option.

name: Inevitable Death

src.description: Once in each of your opponent’s turns, if this model is on the battlefield when another friendly AELDARI unit is destroyed, just after removing the last model in that unit, you can remove this model from the battlefield and set it up as close as possible to where that destroyed model was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

note: Incomprehensible output; actual mechanic: once per opponent turn when friendly unit destroyed, redeploy this model nearby.

name: Avatar of The Whispering God

src.description: If your army includes THE YNCARNE, it cannot include any EPIC HERO units (excluding YNNARI units). If your army includes any EPIC HERO units (excluding YNNARI units), it cannot include THE YNCARNE.

note: Vague constraint description; actual rule: YNCARNE and EPIC HERO units are mutually exclusive in army.

name: Branching Fates (Psychic)

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit to an unmodified 6.

note: Completely wrong: actually rerolls one hit/wound/damage to unmodified 6 once per phase.

name: Blitz

src.description: Once per battle, in your Movement phase, before this model makes a Normal move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, add 2D6"to this model’s Move characteristic and add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Solitaire weapons.

note: Omits the 2D6" move bonus and once-per-battle limit; only applies to Solitaire weapons, not generic +3A.

name: Harvester of Souls

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase, after selecting targets for that unit’s attacks, if every attack targets the same unit, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for every other enemy unit within 3"of the target unit. On a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by explosive debris; after resolving all of that unit’s attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by explosive debris suffers D3 mortal wounds.

note: Wrong mechanic: applies to units within 3" after all attacks resolve on same target, not aura debuff.

name: Raid and Run

src.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3". Otherwise, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can make a Fall Back move of up to D3+3”.

note: Oversimplifies: grants either D3+3" normal move OR D3+3" fallback, not both unconditionally.

name: Fleet of Foot

src.description: This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

note: Unclear phrasing; mechanic: free Fade Back without Battle Focus token, no per-phase limit, removes restrictions.

name: Crystalline Targeting

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly AELDARI unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

note: Says +-1 AP (confusing notation); mechanic is conditional +1 AP aura to friendly units targeting hit enemy unit.

name: Fury of the Void (Psychic)

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more attacks made with this model’s Dread of the Deep Void. Until the end of the turn, that unit is riven. Each time an AELDARI model from your army makes an attack that targets a riven unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

note: Condition wrong: checks if target marked as 'riven', not if model has RIVEN keyword; applies to friendly attacks.

name: Titanic Strides

src.description:
Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4"or less in height. When doing so:

■ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
■ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4"in height, but if it does, after it has moved, roll one D6:on a 1, this model is Battle‐shocked.

note: Formatting is cryptic; mechanics correct but presentation obscures that model can pass through terrain/enemies with conditions.

name: Point‐blank Devastation

src.description: Each time this model’s heavy wraithcannon or suncannon targets a unit within half range, you can re‐roll the dice to determine the number of attacks made.

note: Vague 'modify stats'; rerolls attack count dice at half-range for specific weapons, not generic stat buff.

name: Eviscerating Fly-by

src.description: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll one D6 for each model in this unit:for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

note: Missing the D6 roll per model; should exclude MONSTER/VEHICLE units.

name: Cluster caltrops

src.description: Each time you roll to inflict wounds using this unit’s Eviscerating Fly-by ability, you can re-roll one D6 for each model in this unit equipped with cluster caltrops.

note: Vague 'modify stats'; actually allows rerolling D6s when using Eviscerating Fly-by.

name: Grenade Pack Flyover

src.description: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, select one enemy unit within 8"of and visible to this unit and roll one D6 for each SWOOPING HAWKS model in this unit:for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). Each time this unit uses this ability, until the end of the turn, you cannot target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem.

note: Scope/timing confusing; mechanic: once per turn in movement phase, D6 per model (max 6 mortal wounds).

name: Burning Lance

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 6"to the Range characteristic of Melta weapons equipped by models in that unit.

note: Vague 'modify stats'; actually +6" range to Melta weapons, leadership requirement not captured.

name: Unquenchable Resolve

src.description: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6:on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

note: Missing the 2+ condition and one-time-only limitation; resurrects on 2+.

name: Reavers of the Void

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re‐roll the Hit roll instead.

note: Oversimplifies: can reroll 1s unconditionally OR any hit if target near objective; two separate options.

name: Sonic Destruction

src.description: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack with its vibro cannon that targets an enemy unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1 for each other friendly VIBRO CANNON PLATFORM model that made one or more attacks with its vibro cannon that also targeted that enemy unit this phase.

note: Completely wrong: +1 S/AP/Damage per other vibro cannon platform targeting same unit, cumulative.

name: Treacherous Illusion (Psychic)

src.description: Melee weapons equipped by enemy models have the [HAZARDOUS] ability while targeting this model’s unit.

note: Wrong scope: applies to enemy melee weapons targeting this unit, not unit gaining hazardous.

name: Whirling Death

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6"to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and each time a model in that unit makes an Advance move, ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance that model can be moved during that move.

note: Missing Advance mechanic: grants no roll, +6" move, vertical ignore during Advances.

name: Flickerjump

src.description: In your Movement phase, each time this unit is selected to make a Normal move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge and models in it have a Move characteristic of 24". Each time this unit uses this ability, at the end of the phase, roll one D6 for each model in this unit:for each 1, this unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

note: Wrong output: grants 24" move and prevents charges; inflicts D6 mortal wounds per model (not weapon).

name: Sadistic Raiders

src.description: At the end of your Command phase, if you control an objective marker that this unit (or a TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

note: Wrong mechanic: controls objective marker stickiness rule, not OC modification.

name: Target Acquisition

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a long rifle. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

note: Reverses mechanic: denies cover to enemy, not grants it to self. Scope and trigger are wrong.

name: Runes of Fortune (Psychic)

src.description: Each time an enemy unit declares a charge, if one or more units with this ability are selected as a target of that charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll.

note: Condition unclear: applies on any charge against self, not just if charged this turn. Missing trigger detail.

name: Titanic Agility

src.description: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

note: Garbled syntax; unclear what 'no end position' means. Misses can move through but not within-ER.

name: No Escape

src.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle-shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

note: Drastically oversimplified; misses Desperate Escape tests, Battle-shocked interaction, and MONSTER/VEHICLE exclusion.

name: Protect (Psychic)

src.description: While a FARSEER model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

note: Missing that leader must be Farseer, not generic attachment. Scope is conditional on leadership.

name: Guide (Psychic)

src.description: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 18"of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly AELDARI model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

note: Missing target selection happens in Movement phase; says friendly Aeldari but only affects selected enemy unit.

name: Indomitable Strength of Will

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable that unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6:on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

note: Completely wrong: describes Battle Focus token recovery, not stat modification.

name: Bladestorm

src.description: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

note: Missing half-range condition; applies to all targets, not just those in half range.

name: Fire Support

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

note: Wrong scope: affects friendly disembarked units, not original unit. Trigger and beneficiary mismatch.

name: Swift Demise

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is the closest eligible target, you can re‐roll the Hit roll instead.

note: Missing re-roll closest target condition; second re-roll option omitted from scope.

name: Choreographer of War

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a Pile‐in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6"instead of up to 3". In addition, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends it as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

note: Omits 'does not need to end closer to closest enemy' exception; incomplete movement description.

name: Cegorach’s Favour

src.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack, you can re‐roll a Hit roll of 1 and add 1 to the Wound roll.

note: Wrong scope: applies to melee attacks only, not 'fight phase'. Limits to ones, not all hits.

name: Path of the Outcast

src.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9"of this unit, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

note: Unclear: triggers on enemy movement, not a normal reactive aura. Movement type scope incomplete.

name: Skyhunter

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

note: Says 'A' instead of FLY keyword; bonus applies to all attacks, not just against flyers.

name: Hallucinogen Grenades

src.description: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one AELDARI INFANTRY unit from your army visible to and within 36” of this unit:until the end of the phase, that unit has the Stealth ability.

note: Completely wrong: grants Stealth to friendly unit in opponent's phase, not stat modification.

name: Overlord

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‐roll a Wound roll of 1. While that unit is below its Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re‐roll the Wound roll instead.

note: First condition unclear; misses that doubled re-rolls apply when unit is below strength.

name: Shadow Field

src.description: You cannot re‐roll invulnerable saving throws made for the bearer. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for the bearer is failed, until the end of the battle, the bearer has no invulnerable save.

note: Invulnerable value missing (?); describes permanent loss, not just initial state. Mechanics inverted.

name: Cloudstrider

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In addition, while this model is leading a unit, when that unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, in your movement phase, it can use this ability. If it does, that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6"horizontally away from all enemy models, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

note: Grossly oversimplified; misses operator's turn timing, reserves placement, and post-deep-strike charge restriction.

name: Cry of the Wind

src.description: Each time this model is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, each time this model makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

note: Timing correct but says 'setup' turn end, not during turn. Missing auto-critical on unmodified 6.

name: Malevolent Souls

src.description: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 3+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

note: Missing 3+ roll condition and that model must not have fought yet. Simplified mechanic.

name: Forceshield

src.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

note: Value missing (?); should be 4+ not generic. Incomplete save statement.

name: Dance of Death

src.description:
At the start of the Fight phase, select one of the following abilities for this unit to gain until the end of the phase:

■ Hero’s Prowess: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ Villain’s Doom: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
■ Trickster’s Grace: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

note: Conflates three distinct choosable abilities into single effect; missing choice mechanic and Trickster's Grace option.

name: Lithe Embarkation

src.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this TRANSPORT, you can select one friendly YNNARI INFANTRY unit that only includes models from the units listed in this unit’s Transport section, that has 6 or fewer models and that is wholly within 6"of this TRANSPORT. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this TRANSPORT.

note: Wrong phase and completely vague 'special embark rule'; misses Ynnari faction, unit size, and Fight phase timing.

name: Harassment Fire

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

note: Missing suppressed state; penalty applies to all attacks, not just subsequent ones.

name: Spiritseer

src.description: While this model is within 3"of one or more friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

note: Range wrong: within 3", not 6". Applies conditionally, not general aura.

name: Spirit Mark

src.description: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, when this model starts or ends a move, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 6"of this model (excluding TITANIC units) and one enemy unit visible to this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, weapons equipped by models in that friendly unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting that enemy unit.

note: Oversimplified; misses manual targeting at movement, range restrictions, and per-target limiting.

name: Tears of Isha (Psychic)

src.description: In your Command phase, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 6"of this model. If one or more models in that unit are destroyed, you can return one destroyed model to that unit. Otherwise, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

note: Says return d3 OR regain d3; actual rule is prioritize return one, else regain d3.

name: Rapid Embarkation

src.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this TRANSPORT, you can select one friendly HARLEQUINS INFANTRY unit that has 6 or fewer models that is wholly within 6"of this TRANSPORT. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this TRANSPORT.

note: Wrong phase (Fight not Fight-end); vague 'special embark'; misses Harlequins faction and unit-size limits.

name: Skyfire

src.description: Each time you target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem just after an enemy unit that can Fly starts or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, when resolving that Stratagem, in addition to shooting that enemy unit, you can select up to 3 other enemy units within 24" of this model that can Fly; this model can also shoot at each of those units with its Firestorm scatter laser (provided each one is an eligible target), but when doing so, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit.

note: Completely wrong mechanic: describes Fire Overwatch interaction, not reactive move. Wrong ability entirely.

name: Strafing Run

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

note: Says 'A' instead of 'cannot Fly'; bonus applies to all targets, not non-flyers.

name: Hover

src.description: When you are instructed to Declare Battle Formations, you can declare this model will be in Hover mode. Its Move characteristic changes to 20" and it loses the AIRCRAFT keyword.

note: Omits loses AIRCRAFT condition; unclear 'set M to 20' lacks context for hover mode declaration.

name: Psytronome Shaper

src.description: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Wraith Construct or Aeldari Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Wraith Construct or Aeldari Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

note: Range is 3", not 6"; affects specific Wraith/Vehicle models, not generic aura.

name: Bonesinger

src.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Wraith Construct or Aeldari Vehicle units, unless it is leading a unit, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

note: Range 3" correct; misses 'unless leading' condition and specific unit-type targets.

name: Reaver Band

src.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

note: Misses NOT in engagement range condition; describes reactive move but scope unclear.

name: Battle Focus

src.description:
If your Army Faction is ASURYANI, at the start of the battle round, you receive a number of Battle Focus tokens based on the battle size, as shown in the table below.-Each time one of the triggers shown in the Agile Manoeuvres section below occurs, you can spend one Battle Focus token to enable the relevant eligible unit to perform that Agile Manoeuvre. A unit is eligible to perform an Agile Manoeuvre if it has this ability and has not already performed an Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot trigger the same Agile Manoeuvre more than once per phase. At the end of the battle round, all unspent Battle Focus tokens are lost.
Agile Manoeuvres:

note: Drastically oversimplified; misses token allocation per battle size, agile maneuver system, and round-end loss.
